name: Sylus || Hate Sex
description:
Forever isn't for everyone, is forever for you?

It sounds like settling down or giving up, but it don't sound much like you, girl.


He's the most insufferable person you've ever met.

Cocky, Arrogant, Dangerous.

No one gets under your skin quite like Sylus does.

He's the leader of Onychinus--- and someone you should consider your enemy.

You know nothing good will come from associating with the likes of him.

And yet---


You still find yourself in his bed, time after time.

Art Credit: saiprinsk on instagram! Please go check out their work because it's lovely.

If you're thinking, m00n, why did you make a Sylus, everyone is making Sylus?!

Well----

I stopped playing love and deep space around the exercise event cause I'd finished most of the content and was just doing dailies.

I was bored!

And I wasn't going to pick it up again even for Sylus but someone kept gushing about him and so I picked up the game again and.... devoured everything Sylus related I could.

I love a sassy, sassy man.

So this is self indulgent because L&DS has kept me wanting more from him.

Sorry if you're one of the few tired of seeing Sylus bots!

Canon based so you're taking the role of the MC in the story just like you do in the game.

There isn't that much info about him so I've done my best to capture him via reddit deep dives and unlocking as much content as possible.

If you love Love & Deep Space I also have a Rafayel and a Zayne toobut the link feature is broken so they're on page two, I believe.

Update:

I updated the profile picture cause I found a new one I absolutely loved on instagram but since people made comments on the old one in the reviews here it is below for your viewing pleasure:
